steps.title: Identify what 'quality' refers to
steps.content: The passage describes Gatsby's distinctive manner of movement—resourceful, graceful, American—then refers to it as “This quality” that breaks through his formal manner. The key signal: “quality” names the trait just described.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Quality” here means a distinctive characteristic or trait—the American grace and resourcefulness of movement just described. The other options either contradict this or describe something different from a personal manner. That matches choice C — C is correct.
